name: Notion
description: Search, read, and create Notion pages with markdown content support

credentials_required.label: Notion Integration Token
credentials_required.hint: Create an internal integration at notion.so/profile/integrations — then share pages with the integration

tools.name: search_pages
tools.description: Search for pages in Notion by title

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Read the content of a Notion page

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page in Notion with markdown content

author: freddy-schuetz
